transcript: Speaker A: Bro nannayi poyi. Njan paranju I am very passionate about this vacancy. [Bro, it went well. I said I am very passionate about this vacancy.] Speaker B: Vacancy-a? Eda potta, avide job description-il opportunity-na ezhuthiyirikkunnath. Vacancy ennu parayunnath ningal thanne hire cheyyumbozhanu. Itthanu problem. English ariyam pakshe correct aaya word correct place-il parayan practice venam. Athin vendiyanu SpeakX. AI teacher undu. Real interview questions-il practice cheyyippikkum. Ningal mistakes cheythal appol thanne correct cheyyum, judge cheyyathe. Daily 15 minutes. [Vacancy? You fool, in the job description it is written 'opportunity'. You say 'vacancy' when you yourself are hiring. This is the problem. You know English but you need practice to say the correct word in the correct place. That's what SpeakX is for. There is an AI teacher. It will make you practice with real interview questions. If you make mistakes, it will correct you immediately, without judging. Daily 15 minutes.] SpeakX download cheyyu, first 20 questions free aanu. Confident-ayi samsarikkoo. [Download SpeakX, first 20 questions are free. Speak confidently.]
on_screen_text: Bro nannayi poyi [Bro, it went well] / njan paranju [I said] / I am very passionate about this vacancy / Vacancy? / Arre job description-il [In the job description] / opportunity aanu [it is opportunity] / Vacancy enn parayunnath [Saying vacancy is] / ningal thanne [when you yourself] / hire cheyyumbozhanu [are hiring] / itdhan problem [this is the problem] / English ariyam [know English] / pakshe correct word [but correct word] / correctly place-il [in the correct place] / practice venam [need practice] / Athin vendiyanu [That's why] / SpeakX / AI teacher undu [There is an AI teacher] / real interview questions / practice cheyyippikkum [will make you practice] / mistakes cheythal [if you make mistakes] / appol thanne correct cheyyum [will correct immediately] / judge cheyyathe [without judging] / Daily 15 minutes / SpeakX download cheyyu [Download SpeakX] / first 20 questions free aanu [first 20 questions are free] / Confidently samsarikkoo [Speak confidently] / SpeakX KEY TO CONFIDENCE
summary: A job seeker is corrected by his friend for using the wrong English word during an interview. The friend introduces SpeakX, an AI-powered English learning app that offers non-judgmental corrections and interview practice. The ad concludes with a call to download the app and try the first 20 questions for free.
